# Examples: hooks-management skill
This file collects usage examples, CLI invocations, and integration patterns for the hooks-management skill.
## Example 1: Install All Hooks
- To install all git hooks:
```sh
python scripts/install-hooks.py
```
## Example 2: Verify Hooks
- To verify hooks are installed:
```text
python scripts/install-hooks.py --check
```
---
Add more examples as new tools or scripts are integrated with this skill.
